Join the Collective

Connecting Artists to Walls, Cities, and Opportunity

Founded by working artists, for artists. We manage grants, partnerships, and logistics so you can focus on creating. Experience the grassroots creative energy of Tampa Bay.

View Opportunities Support Public Art

PAC

Connecting muralists, street artists, and public artists with paid opportunities. For artists, by artists.
